2605.14859.title: Do Coding Agents Understand Least-Privilege Authorization?
2605.14859.paper_summary: As coding agents gain access to shells, repositories, and user files, least-privilege authorization becomes a prerequisite for safe deployment: an agent should receive enough authority to complete the task, without unnecessary authority that exposes sensitive surfaces.To study whether current models can infer this boundary themselves, we first introduce permission-boundary inference, where a model maps a task instruction and terminal environment to a file-level read/write/execute policy, and AuthBench, a benchmark of 120 realistic terminal tasks with human-reviewed permission labels and executable validators for utility and attack outcomes.AuthBench shows that authorization is not a simple conservative-versus-permissive calibration problem: frontier models often omit permissions required by the execution chain while also granting unused or sensitive accesses.Increasing inference-time reasoning does not resolve this mismatch. Instead, each model moves toward a model-specific authorization attractor: more reasoning makes it more consistent in its own failure mode, whether broad-but-exposed or tight-but-brittle.This suggests that direct policy generation is the bottleneck, because a single generation must both discover all necessary accesses and reject all unnecessary ones.We therefore propose Sufficiency-Tightness Decomposition, which first generates a coverage-oriented policy by forward-simulating the task and then audits each granted entry for grounding and sensitivity.Across tested models, this decomposition improves sensitive-task success by up to 15.8% on tightness-biased models while reducing attack success across all evaluated models.
2605.14859.paper_summary_zh: 隨著編碼代理獲得對外殼、代碼庫和用戶文件的訪問，最小特權授權成為安全部署的前提：代理應該獲得足夠的權限來完成任務，而不應有不必要的權限，這會暴露敏感面。為了研究當前模型是否能夠自行推斷這一邊界，我們首先介紹了權限邊界推斷，該模型將任務指令和終端環境映射到文件級別的讀/寫/執行策略，以及 AuthBench，一個包含 120 個真實終端任務的基準，這些任務具有經人審核的權限標籤和可執行的驗證器，用於效用和攻擊結果。AuthBench 顯示授權並不是一個簡單的保守與寬容的校準問題：前沿模型經常省略執行鏈所需的權限，同時也授予未使用或敏感的訪問。增加推理時間的推理並不能解決這一不匹配。相反，每個模型都朝著特定於模型的授權吸引子移動：更多的推理使其在自身的失敗模式中更一致，無論是廣泛但暴露的，還是緊湊但脆弱的。這表明直接的策略生成是瓶頸，因為單次生成必須同時發現所有必要的訪問並拒絕所有不必要的訪問。因此，我們提出了充分性-緊密性分解，該方法首先通過前向模擬任務生成一個以覆蓋為導向的策略，然後審核每個授予的條目以進行基礎和敏感性審查。在測試的模型中，這一分解在緊密性偏向的模型上將敏感任務的成功率提高了最多 15.8%，同時降低了所有評估模型的攻擊成功率。
2605.14859.author: Zheng Yan et.al.
2605.14859.authors: Zheng Yan, Jingxiang Weng, Charles Chen, Dengyun Peng, Ethan Qin, Jiannan Guan, Jinhao Liu, Qiming Yu, Yixin Yuan, Fanqing Meng, Carl Che, Mengkang Hu
